name: room_mediator
description: Orchestrate turn-taking in a Meeting Room. Picks the next agent, calls agent.talk, appends reply to transcript.

inputs.name: room_id
inputs.description: ID of the room to run a turn in

inputs.name: message
inputs.description: New message to inject into the room

outputs.name: done
outputs.description: True if room reached max_turns or [room: done]
